queries.sql: SELECT lap_duration, is_pit_out_lap, duration_sector_1, duration_sector_2, duration_sector_3 FROM raw.laps WHERE session_key = 9102 AND lap_duration IS NOT NULL

queries.motivation: valid-lap count for one driver (partial-index path)
queries.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM raw.laps WHERE session_key = 9102 AND driver_number = 1 AND lap_duration IS NOT NULL

queries.motivation: stint-window lookup for one driver at one lap
queries.sql: SELECT compound FROM raw.stints WHERE session_key = 9102 AND driver_number = 1 AND lap_start <= 10 AND lap_end >= 10

queries.motivation: pit-in lookup for one driver at one lap
queries.sql: SELECT * FROM raw.pit WHERE session_key = 9102 AND driver_number = 1 AND lap_number = 10

queries.motivation: position-history time scan, top 100 by date
queries.sql: SELECT * FROM raw.position_history WHERE session_key = 9102 ORDER BY date LIMIT 100

queries.motivation: per-driver mean lap duration (covering include index)
queries.sql: SELECT driver_number, avg(lap_duration) FROM raw.laps WHERE session_key = 9102 AND lap_duration IS NOT NULL GROUP BY driver_number

queries.motivation: per-driver compound counts across full session
queries.sql: SELECT driver_number, compound, count(*) FROM raw.stints WHERE session_key = 9102 GROUP BY driver_number, compound

queries.motivation: per-driver pit count across full session
queries.sql: SELECT driver_number, count(*) FROM raw.pit WHERE session_key = 9102 GROUP BY driver_number
SELECT date, driver_number, position FROM raw.position_history WHERE session_key = 9102 AND date >= (SELECT max(date) - INTERVAL '5 minutes' FROM raw.position_history WHERE session_key = 9102)
SELECT driver_number, percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY lap_duration) FROM raw.laps WHERE session_key = 9102 AND lap_duration IS NOT NULL GROUP BY driver_number
